title: REACH Essential Care Interdental Firm Toothbrush, Duo Pack x 4, Full Head Hard Bristle Manual Toothbrushes, Variety Colors Multipack, Daily Oral Enamel Dental Care Blue+red, Green+Purple
features: Firm Bristles for Deep Cleaning: Features firm bristles designed to thoroughly clean between teeth and along the gumline, helping to remove plaque buildup effectively.
Full Head Interdental Design: The full-size brush head is shaped to access hard-to-reach areas for a more complete clean.
Ergonomic Non-Slip Handle: Designed for comfort and control, the textured grip handle helps ensure a stable brushing experience.
4 Duo Packs (8 Brushes Total): Great value pack with 4 sets of 2 toothbrushes—perfect for families, travel, or long-term use.
Assorted Colours Included: Each pack includes a variety of colours, making it easy to identify individual brushes in shared households.
description: Product description REACH Essential Care Fixed Interdental Toothbrush Duo Pack x 4 Full Head Hard Bristle Manual Toothbrushes Assorted Colors Multipack Daily Mouth Enamel Dental Care Directions Wet the toothbrush, give toothpaste, brush the teeth for two minutes and rinse thoroughly. Safety Warning Adult supervision is recommended when using the toothbrush by children. See more
